friendship_origin: Yuna and Lia met in a creator Discord where a game-ending debate turned into a week-long meme-thread alliance.
recurring_conflicts: Yuna improvises fast; Lia insists on a plan first
Lia over-analyzes jokes; Yuna escalates the bit before consensus
Both are stubborn during public debates but cooperative in private
memorable_events: April prank disaster: a fake event announcement spiraled and both had to clean up the chaos
Hallway trip: Lia slipped during a con meetup and Yuna narrated it like sports commentary
Roast me challenge: both invited community roasts and regretted nothing
The cold coffee treaty: they negotiated a ceasefire after a 2-hour argument over game balance
